# Report Figures

All figures referenced by `docs/PROJECT_REPORT.md`. Drop these straight into
the Word/LaTeX source — every figure is 140–150 dpi PNG, sized for a
single-column figure in a portrait page.

## Architectural diagrams (graphviz, regenerated by `scripts/generate-report-figures.py`)

| File | Report ref | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `fig-3-1-system-architecture.png` | §3.1 Fig 3.1 | High-level System Architecture (Browser → API → Service Layer → ML Layer + DB) |
| `fig-4-1-feature-pipeline.png` | §4.1 Fig 4.1 | Feature Extraction Pipeline (72-dim: protocol/service/flag one-hot + 38 numeric) |
| `fig-4-2-ensemble-voting.png` | §4.3 Fig 4.2 | Ensemble Voting Mechanism (4-way weighted sum + threshold 0.35) |
| `fig-4-3-lstm-architecture.png` | §4.5 Fig 4.3 | LSTM Sequence Model Architecture (8-flow window, hidden 16) |
| `fig-5-1-active-learning-loop.png` | §5 Fig 5.1 | Active Learning Feedback Loop (operator → /api/rlhf → weight rebalance) |
| `fig-6-1-auto-response-flow.png` | §6 Fig 6.1 | Autonomous Response Decision Flow (severity → block/alert/monitor) |

## Dashboard screenshots (chromium-headless against `npm run dev`)

| File | Report ref | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `fig-10-1-dashboard.png` | §10.1 Fig 10.1 | Main Dashboard tab (stat cards, live control, traffic chart) |
| `fig-10-1-detection.png` | §10.1 | Detections tab (Confirm/Dismiss UI for Active Learning) |
| `fig-10-1-models.png` | §10.1 | ML Models tab (per-model comparison + research-contribution panel) |
| `fig-10-1-auto-response.png` | §10.1 | Auto-Response tab (threshold sliders, blocked-IP list) |
| `fig-10-1-training.png` | §10.1 | Training tab (verified-sample queue, retrain trigger) |
| `fig-10-1-datasets.png` | §10.1 | Datasets tab (NSL-KDD + CICIDS-2017 metadata, cross-dataset card) |
| `fig-10-1-alerts.png` | §10.1 | Alerts tab (severity-grouped handler workflow) |
| `fig-10-1-assistant.png` | §10.1 | AI Assistant tab (Gemini chat) |

### How the dashboard screenshots were captured

```bash
npm run dev &                                    # start server on :3000
curl -X POST 'http://localhost:3000/api/seed?force=1'   # populate ~1.6k packets
# Then for each tab:
chromium-browser --headless=new --disable-gpu --no-sandbox \
  --window-size=1440,1500 --hide-scrollbars \
  --virtual-time-budget=15000 \
  --screenshot=fig-10-1-<tab>.png \
  "http://localhost:3000/?tab=<tab>"
```

Tabs IDs (per `app/page.tsx` and the `?tab=` query param added in this commit):
`dashboard`, `detection`, `models`, `auto-response`, `training`, `datasets`,
`alerts`, `assistant`.

If the screenshots look empty (stat cards all zero), the seed timestamps
are older than 24 h. Run with `?force=1` and re-shoot immediately.

## Regenerate everything

```bash
# Architectural + 9.1/9.2 (no model retraining)
python3 scripts/generate-report-figures.py

# Empirical findings (run trainers first if you don't have artefacts)
npm run eval:al            && python3 scripts/plot-al-curve.py
npm run eval:adversarial   && python3 scripts/plot-adversarial.py
npm run eval:ablation      && python3 scripts/plot-ablation.py
npm run train:adversarial  && python3 scripts/plot-adversarial-comparison.py
```
